title: Senior Backend Developer
description: ABOUT Jotform Jotform is a San Francisco-based SaaS company with more than 35 million users worldwide. We are thriving and growing, and we’ve never needed outside funding. That’s because we like keeping things agile, independent and fun. Jotform believes everyone should be able to create their own online forms. Our 10,000+ ready-made form templates, 100+ integrations and more than 380 widgets have made us one of the most popular online form builders for organizations of all sizes — from small businesses to enterprises. Since our inception in 2006, our mission has been to help users create, manage and share online forms and receive responses in the easiest way possible. ABOUT THE ROLE As a rapidly growing company, Jotform is seeking a Senior Backend Developer in our İzmir office, located at a relaxed fun environment in Teknopark İzmir. Here’s what you will be doing: Work closely with product management, front end developers, devOps and designers Design, build and deploy new features for Jotform Deliver solutions in a continuous integration flow to production having 35 million users Review and iterate architecture to ensure scale along with the growth Education & Work Experience & Technical Requirements: BS Degree in Computer Science/Engineering or related technical field or equivalent practical experience 5+ year experience building web applications Proficiency in PHP Familiarity with Distributed Systems programming Experience in SaaS and high traffic applications are highly preferred Understanding of HTML, CSS, Javascript, React and other web technologies Solid understanding of OOP principles Working experience with CI/CD and related tools like Git and Jenkins Ability to write high-performance, maintainable and reusable code Excellent command of English Personal Specifications/Skills: Demonstrated ability to work independently with minimal supervision A passion to learn and keep up with the latest technologies Jotform PERKS High growth-paced environment with collaborative and unique team culture Generous market competitive total compensation package Health Insurance Professional Growth & Career Opportunities: We support your personal and professional development with educational materials and expenses & relevant conferences abroad to stay up to date with the latest industry trends & online courses or coaching - and support you pursuing ones that you are passionate about! Challenging projects, regular feedback, healthy competition Fun & Relax working environment: When we’re in the office; music, jeans and t-shirts are the norm & kitchens stocked with healthy & tasty snacks & drinks OUR PROCESS We’ll review your application along with all the others we receive and pick the top profiles for a screening call. In many cases due to time constraints and our candidate volume, only the short-listed candidates are contacted but we do consider each application carefully. If you have been selected as a short-listed candidate, we will contact you for a short screening call to get to know you better. If you don’t get a call, please don’t be disappointed! We receive many applications for each role and have to prioritize who we speak to. Thank you for taking the time to apply for a position at Jotform! Jotform is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. https://www.jotform.com/job-applicant-privacy/

title: Senior React Native Developer
description: ABOUT Jotform Jotform is a San Francisco-based SaaS company with more than 35 million users worldwide. We are thriving and growing, and we’ve never needed outside funding. That’s because we like keeping things agile, independent and fun. Jotform believes everyone should be able to create their own online forms. Our 10,000+ ready-made form templates, 100+ integrations and more than 380 widgets have made us one of the most popular online form builders for organizations of all sizes — from small businesses to enterprises. Since our inception in 2006, our mission has been to help users create, manage and share online forms and receive responses in the easiest way possible. ABOUT THE ROLE Jotform is seeking Senior React Native Developers in our Ankara office, located at a relaxed fun environment in Hacettepe University Teknokent. As a rapidly growing company we are hiring for similar positions continuously and once an opportunity matches with your qualifications, we will contact you immediately. Here’s what you will be doing: Work on React Native to create Android/iOS Apps Work on ReactJS to develop web applications Develop cross-browser, cross-platform compatible solutions Develop scalable, reliable, maintainable and reusable code Deliver solutions in a continuous integration flow to live system having 30 million users Test your code and solutions with A/B tests and/or via feedbacks from the user testing services Work closely with product management, back-end developers, DevOps and designers Come up with ideas to improve user experience and openly sharing them with the team Attend hackathons with utmost passion to try new things Education & Work Experience & Technical Requirements: Bachelor’s degree in CS/CENG or in a related technical field or equivalent practical experience 6 years of experiences in Frontend or Mobile Development Deep knowledge of React Native, ReactJS and Redux Proficiency in JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, AJAX Working experience with Git Preferably experience in SaaS Excellent command of English Superior communication and interpersonal skills A passion to learn and keep up with the cutting edge technologies Ability to write high-performance, maintainable and reusable code Ability to work independently with minimal supervision Jotform PERKS High growth-paced environment with collaborative and unique team culture Generous market competitive total compensation package Health Insurance Professional Growth & Career Opportunities: We support your personal and professional development with educational materials and expenses & relevant conferences abroad to stay up to date with the latest industry trends & online courses or coaching - and support you pursuing ones that you are passionate about! In many cases due to time constraints and our candidate volume, only the short-listed candidates are contacted but we do consider each application carefully. If you have been selected as a short-listed candidate, we will contact you for a short screening call to get to know you better. If you don’t get a call, please don’t be disappointed! We receive many applications for each role and have to prioritize who we speak to. Thank you for taking the time to apply for a position at Jotform! Jotform is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. https://www.jotform.com/job-applicant-privacy/

title: Sr. BackEnd Developer
description: About Us Founded in 2000, Akakçe is Turkey’s leading price comparison platform, helping over 40 million users find the best deals every month. Our commitment to cutting-edge technology, data-driven insights, and continuous innovation makes us a key player in the e-commerce ecosystem. About the Role At Akakçe, we are scaling our web and mobile platform to handle millions of daily users. We are looking for Senior Back-end Developers to join our team, who will be responsible for high-impact projects and work closely with product and data teams to create seamless experiences for visitors. What We Offer Career opportunity in the most innovative company in Turkey's fastest-growing sector, Competitive salary, private health insurance, and comprehensive benefits, A bonus system based on company performance and individual contributions, Developing your skills and learning continuously with the responsibilities you will take from the first day, Shaping the future of e-commerce as part of a dynamic team, Various training platforms to continue your professional development, A working environment with a team spirit in a lean organization that values talents, not titles, Team activities, and regular company-wide events. Responsibilities To take part in the most ambitious web and mobile projects in Turkey, Taking part in all software development stages starting from problem solving, To make an innovative contribution by constantly following the latest technology in its field, To develop solutions by projecting the improvement of the system. Required Skills Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering or related disciplines, Minimum 5 years of experience in software development processes, Experience in .NET core, Experience in relational databases like MsSQL, Preferably experience in queueing systems like RabbitMQ, Preferably experience in Clean Code architecture and Unit Testing, Preferably experience in platfoms that work under high user loads, Preferably experience in Python, Good command of English language, Being an agile minded team player, having good communication skills, Eagerness on self-improvement, open-minded, future-oriented, Strong analytical, problem solving, debugging and troubleshooting skills, Open to feedback, good team player, result oriented attitude and analytical mind, No military obligation for male candidates. How to Apply? If you're passionate about web and mobile development and want to shape the future of e-commerce, join Akakçe! Apply now and be part of a team that makes an impact. We look forward to meeting you! "Your data gathered in your application to this job advertisement will be processed in automated systems to manage job application procedures by Akakçe Bilgi Teknolojileri Sanayi ve Ticaret A. Ş. (“Akakçe”) according to the Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data (“KVKK”) and related regulations."

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Apilex is a global legaltech company building AI that transforms how legal professionals work. Powered by a proprietary database of 200M+ court decisions and legal documents, our platform delivers semantic search, contract analysis, and automated legal drafting — turning days of legal research into seconds. Since our founding, we've grown to a team of 90+ people and established ourselves as Türkiye's leading AI legal assistant. Now, we're taking it global — expanding into France, Germany, Brasil, Italy and Spain to compete in the billion-dollar legaltech market. What sets us apart? We don't use off-the-shelf AI. We build domain-specific, closed-circuit AI models with multi-layered verification systems that eliminate hallucinations and deliver answers backed by real citations and legal reasoning. Every feature we ship changes how lawyers work, not in theory, but in practice. We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to design and scale the high-traffic microservices that form the backbone of our global legal AI platform. Key Responsibilities Scalable Architecture: Design and develop high-traffic, scalable microservice architectures to support our expanding global footprint. Code Excellence: Raise the bar on code quality by leading code review processes and implementing best practices across the backend. Technical Leadership: Provide mentorship to the engineering team and guide technical decision-making for complex features. System Integration: Build and maintain reliable integrations between core services, AI agents, and large-scale data stores. Performance Optimization: Ensure system reliability and low latency across distributed services through efficient caching and messaging strategies. What We’re Looking For 5+ years of backend experience building and scaling Java and Spring Boot applications in production Strong foundation in software architecture design including OOP and SOLID principles across various scales Hands-on experience with both PostgreSQL and MongoDB including the ability to design hybrid data architectures Deep knowledge of Elasticsearch or similar technologies for high-performance search and indexing Practical experience with messaging systems like RabbitMQ or Kafka and in-memory caching with Redis Solid understanding of WebSocket and real-time streaming architectures for distributed environments Direct experience with cloud platforms and building automated CI/CD pipelines Ability to ship high-quality code and iterate quickly rather than waiting for perfect conditions Why join us? We're building the AI that lawyers rely on every day, across every area of their practice — the core of how thousands of legal professionals research, draft, and reason. You'll join a team solving one of the hardest challenges in AI: making it reliable enough for high-stakes, real-world decisions. We're scaling across Europe and Latin America, shipping fast, and setting the bar for what reliable AI looks like in legal. Whatever your role, your work here will be visible and meaningful. We're one of the fastest-growing AI companies in Türkiye, and we're looking for ambitious people who want to build the future of legal technology on a global stage. This is Apilex. AI for Legal. Join us.

title: Otonom Sistemler/Backend & Frontend/Bilgisayarlı Görü Uzmanı
description: Otonom Sistemler/Backend & Frontend/Bilgisayarlı Görü Uzmanı Hakkımızda İTÜ Teknopark'ta büyüyen teknoloji odaklı bir start-up olarak, Tarım Teknolojileri ve Savunma Sektörüne yönelik; robotik ve otonom sistemler, makine öğrenmesi ve bilgisayarlı görü alanlarında son teknoloji çözümler geliştiriyoruz. Dinamik ve motivasyonu yüksek ekibimizle, tarımsal otomasyon ve akıllı algılama sistemleri başta olmak üzere yüksek katma değerli projeler hayata geçiriyoruz. Ekibimizi güçlendirmek için; veri yönetimi ve değerlendirmede güçlü bir backend altyapısı kurabilen, kullanıcı dostu arayüzler tasarlayan ve bunların yanı sıra bilgisayarlı görü pipeline'larını geliştirip sahaya taşıyabilen özgün bir mühendis arıyoruz. İstihdam edilecek kişi tarım teknoloji leri konulu TÜBİTAK destekli projemize yürütücü olarak görevlendirilecektir. www.aytutech.com Görev Tanımı Bu pozisyonda üstleneceğiniz başlıca sorumluluklar şunlardır: 1. Bilgisayarlı Görü ve Görüntü İşleme Tarımsal uygulamalara yönelik nesne tespiti (object detection) pipeline'larının geliştirilmesi; bitki, fidan ve anomali tespiti modellerinin eğitimi ve optimizasyonu Multispektral hava görüntülerinden alan haritası oluşturma; görüntü bölgelerinin sahadaki bitki/fidan konumlarıyla otomatik olarak ilişkilendirilmesi Renk uzayı dönüşümleri, geometrik düzeltme, mozaikleme ve filtre uygulamaları dahil ham görüntü verilerinin işlenmesi YOLO veya benzeri derin öğrenme modellerinin entegrasyonu, ince ayarı ve sahaya uyarlanması 2. Backend Geliştirme ve Veri Yönetimi Farklı sensör ve veri kaynaklarından (kamera, GNSS, IMU, multispektral sensör) gelen verilerin toplanması, senkronizasyonu ve depolanması için backend altyapısının tasarlanması ve geliştirilmesi REST API tasarımı; analiz sonuçlarının ve model çıktılarının veritabanına (PostgreSQL, SQLite vb.) kaydedilmesi ve yönetilmesi ML/CV modellerinden gelen çıktıların otomatik değerlendirilmesi ve validasyonu için veri işleme pipeline'larının oluşturulması Verilerin otomatik migrasyonu, entegrasyonu ve uzun süreli arşivlenmesi için sistem altyapısının tasarlanması 3. Frontend ve HMI Geliştirme Karmaşık teknik verileri (CV çıktıları, anomali tespiti, telemetri) anlaşılır ve etkileşimli arayüzlere dönüştüren dashboard ve HMI uygulamalarının geliştirilmesi Modern web teknolojileri (React, Vue.js, Angular vb.) kullanarak gerçek zamanlı görselleştirme sistemlerinin hayata geçirilmesi Mobil platformlarda (Android) kullanıcı arayüzü geliştirme ve saha operatörlerine yönelik kontrol panellerinin oluşturulması Multispektral hava görüntülerinden üretilen haritaların ve analiz katmanlarının (overlay) görselleştirilmesi 4. Otonom Sistem Koordinasyonu Birden fazla insansız hava aracı (İHA/drone) ile kara aracının ortak görev planlaması ve yer kontrol istasyonundan koordinasyonu MAVLink protokolü üzerinden çoklu araç yönetimi, gerçek zamanlı telemetri işleme ve görev takibi ROS2 tabanlı robotik yazılım mimarisinde geliştirme; node, topic, service ve action yapılarının tasarlanması SLAM yöntemleri ve otonom navigasyon algoritmalarının entegrasyonu Aranan Nitelikler Backend ve Yazılım Geliştirme Python ve C++ dillerinde yetkinlik; Linux ortamında geliştirme ve hata ayıklama deneyimi Backend geliştirme: REST API tasarımı, veritabanı modelleme ve yönetimi Docker ile konteynerizasyon; Git ve sürüm yönetimi konusunda deneyim Gerçek zamanlı veri akışı ve senkronizasyon mekanizmaları üzerine çalışma tecrübesi Frontend ve Görselleştirme React, Vue.js veya Angular gibi modern web framework'leriyle arayüz geliştirme deneyimi WebSocket veya MQTT gibi gerçek zamanlı iletişim protokolleriyle entegrasyon tecrübesi Android uygulama geliştirme konusunda temel düzeyde deneyim Bilgisayarlı Görü ve Makine Öğrenmesi OpenCV ile görüntü işleme uygulamaları geliştirme YOLO, PyTorch veya TensorFlow ile nesne tespiti modellerinin eğitimi ve kullanımı Hava fotoğrafçılığı veya multispektral görüntü işleme konusunda tecrübe (tercih sebebi) Robotik ve Otonom Sistemler ROS2 ile çalışma deneyimi; node, topic, service ve action mimarisi SLAM ve otonom navigasyon yöntemleri hakkında teorik ve pratik bilgi PX4 veya ArduPilot tabanlı uçuş yazılımlarıyla deneyim (tercih sebebi) Elektronik Temelleri Temel elektronik devre okuma ve anlama becerisi; sensör entegrasyonu (SPI, I2C, UART vb.) Güç dağıtımı, kablolama ve basit devre sorunlarını giderme konusunda pratik deneyim Dil Yetkinliği İngilizce teknik dokümantasyon okuma, yazma ve teknik iletişim kurma yetkinliği zorunludur Kişisel Özellikler Ekip içinde aktif rol alan, iletişimi güçlü ve sorumluluk alabilen yapıda Karmaşık ve çok bileşenli sistemlerde özgün çözümler üretebilen, inisiyatif kullanan Projeyi sahiplenen; görevleri bağımsız olarak tamamlayabilen, gerektiğinde kendi çözümlerini geliştiren Hızlı öğrenen, yeni teknoloji ve yöntemlere kolayca adapte olan Saha testlerine katılmaya ve hands-on çalışmaya açık Tercih Sebebi Unreal Engine veya AirSim ile simülasyon ortamı geliştirme ve sensör modelleme deneyimi GIS araçları veya OpenDroneMap gibi haritalama yazılımlarıyla çalışma tecrübesi Qt/QML ile masaüstü veya gömülü arayüz geliştirme deneyimi Flutter veya React Native ile cross-platform mobil geliştirme tecrübesi CI/CD pipeline kurulumu ve test otomasyonu konusunda tecrübe MAVLink protokolü ve çoklu drone koordinasyonu hakkında bilgi Ne Sunuyoruz? Kariyer Gelişimi: ROS2'den derin öğrenmeye, saha robotlarından İHA sistemlerine kadar geniş bir teknoloji yelpazesinde uzmanlaşma fırsatı Sahiplenme ve Etki: Backend altyapısından görüntü işleme pipeline'larına ve kullanıcı arayüzlerine kadar uçtan uca sistemlerde doğrudan etki yaratma şansı Stratejik Rol: Ürün geliştirme süreçlerinde ve teknoloji kararlarında söz sahibi olma imkânı Konum ve Kültür: İTÜ Maslak kampüsü – Teknopark; işbirlikçi, yenilikçi ve büyümeye açık çalışma ortamı İlgileniyorsanız? Ekibimizin bir parçası olmak istiyorsanız, CV'nizi ve kısaca kendinizi tanıtan bir yazıyı aşağıdaki adrese gönderebilirsiniz: info@aytutech.com

title: Senior Backend Engineer (SaaS/AI · Onsite · Şişli, İstanbul)
description: Apilex is a global legaltech company building AI that transforms how legal professionals work. Powered by a proprietary database of 200M+ court decisions and legal documents, our platform delivers semantic search, contract analysis, and automated legal drafting — turning days of legal research into seconds. Since our founding, we've grown to a team of 90+ people and established ourselves as Türkiye's leading AI legal assistant. Now, we're taking it global — expanding into France, Germany, Brasil, Italy and Spain to compete in the billion-dollar legaltech market. What sets us apart? We don't use off-the-shelf AI. We build domain-specific, closed-circuit AI models with multi-layered verification systems that eliminate hallucinations and deliver answers backed by real citations and legal reasoning. Every feature we ship changes how lawyers work, not in theory, but in practice. We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to design and scale the high-traffic microservices that form the backbone of our global legal AI platform. Key Responsibilities Scalable Architecture: Design and develop high-traffic, scalable microservice architectures to support our expanding global footprint. Code Excellence: Raise the bar on code quality by leading code review processes and implementing best practices across the backend. Technical Leadership: Provide mentorship to the engineering team and guide technical decision-making for complex features. System Integration: Build and maintain reliable integrations between core services, AI agents, and large-scale data stores. Performance Optimization: Ensure system reliability and low latency across distributed services through efficient caching and messaging strategies. What We’re Looking For 5+ years of backend experience building and scaling Java and Spring Boot applications in production Strong foundation in software architecture design including OOP and SOLID principles across various scales Hands-on experience with both PostgreSQL and MongoDB including the ability to design hybrid data architectures Deep knowledge of Elasticsearch or similar technologies for high-performance search and indexing Practical experience with messaging systems like RabbitMQ or Kafka and in-memory caching with Redis Solid understanding of WebSocket and real-time streaming architectures for distributed environments Direct experience with cloud platforms and building automated CI/CD pipelines Ability to ship high-quality code and iterate quickly rather than waiting for perfect conditions Why join us? We're building the AI that lawyers rely on every day, across every area of their practice — the core of how thousands of legal professionals research, draft, and reason. You'll join a team solving one of the hardest challenges in AI: making it reliable enough for high-stakes, real-world decisions. We're scaling across Europe and Latin America, shipping fast, and setting the bar for what reliable AI looks like in legal. Whatever your role, your work here will be visible and meaningful. We're one of the fastest-growing AI companies in Türkiye, and we're looking for ambitious people who want to build the future of legal technology on a global stage. This is Apilex. AI for Legal. Join us.

title: Senior Frontend Developer (Angular.js/React.js)
description: About us: Talent has no borders. Proxify's mission is to connect top developers around the world with opportunities they deserve. So, it doesn't matter where you are; we are here to help you fast-track your independent career in the right direction. 🙂 Since our launch, Proxify's developers have successfully worked with 1200+ happy clients to build their products and growth features. 5000+ talented developers trust Proxify and its network to fulfill their dreams and objectives. Proxify is shaped by a global network of supportive, talented developers interested in remote full-time jobs. Our Glassdoor (4.5/5) and Trustpilot (4.8/5) ratings reflect the trust developers place in us and our commitment to our members' success. The Role: We are looking for a Senior Frontend Developer (Angular.js/React.js) for one of our clients. You are a perfect candidate if you are growth-oriented, you love what you do, and you enjoy working on new ideas to develop exciting products. What we are looking for: +5 years of experience with React.js / Angular.js. You follow the best practices and conventions. Relevant experience in CI/CD and related tools. Ability to work with minimal supervision. Intermediate-advanced English level. Ability to communicate well with both technical and non-technical clients. Nice-to-have: Basic backend knowledge for minor backend jobs. Responsibilities: Ability to build libraries and frameworks of reusable efficient code. Competence in designing and implementing low-latency, stable and performing applications. Capacity to effectively collaborate with other team members and stakeholders remotely. Ability to implement data protection systems. Competence in data storage solutions. What we offer: Get paid, not played No more unreliable clients. Enjoy on-time monthly payments with flexible withdrawal options. Predictable project hours Enjoy a harmonious work-life balance with consistent 8-hour working days with clients. Flex days, so you can recharge Enjoy up to 24 flex days off per year without losing pay, for full-time positions found through Proxify. Career-accelerating positions at cutting-edge companies Discover exclusive long-term remote positions at the world's most exciting companies. Hand-picked opportunities, just for you Skip the typical recruitment roadblocks and biases with personally matched positions. One seamless process, multiple opportunities A one-time contracting process for endless opportunities, with no extra assessments. Compensation Enjoy the same pay, every month with positions landed through Proxify.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer (Backend Heavy)
description: 🧭 Pozisyonun Amacı ADL Kurumsal bünyesindeki teknoloji, çağrı merkezi ve çevre teknolojileri projelerinde; ölçeklenebilir, güvenli ve sürdürülebilir sistemler geliştirecek, backend mimarisine yön verecek ve gerektiğinde frontend süreçlerine katkı sağlayacak Senior Full Stack Developer (Backend Heavy) arıyoruz. Bu rol; yalnızca feature geliştirmek değil, aynı zamanda mimari kararlar almak, performans optimizasyonu yapmak, kod standartlarını belirlemek ve sistem tasarımına aktif katkı sağlamak anlamına gelir. 🏗 Backend (Ana Sorumluluk Alanı) ✅ Node.js & NestJS ile ölçeklenebilir ve modüler backend mimarisi kurmak, ✅ RESTful API ve GraphQL servisleri tasarlamak ve geliştirmek, ✅ Microservices architecture prensiplerine uygun servisler geliştirmek, ✅ API versioning, rate limiting, authentication & authorization (JWT, OAuth2) implementasyonu, ✅ Database tasarımı, index optimizasyonu ve query performans iyileştirmeleri, ✅ Caching (Redis), queue sistemleri (RabbitMQ / Kafka vb.) ile entegrasyon, ✅ Logging, monitoring ve error tracking sistemleri kurmak, ✅ CI/CD süreçlerine katkı sağlamak, ✅ Unit, integration ve e2e test süreçlerini yürütmek. 💾 Veritabanı ✅ PostgreSQL ile ilişkisel veri modelleme, ✅ MongoDB ile NoSQL veri modelleme, ✅ Migration süreçlerini yönetmek, ✅ Transaction yönetimi ve veri bütünlüğü sağlamak, ✅ Query optimizasyonu ve performans analizi yapmak. 💻 Frontend (Destekleyici Rol) ✅ React / Next.js ile mevcut projelere katkı sağlamak, ✅ Backend entegrasyonlarını yönetmek, ✅ API contract’larını frontend ekipleriyle koordine etmek, ✅ TypeScript ile tip güvenli veri akışı sağlamak. 🧱 Kod Standartları & Mühendislik Prensipleri Bu pozisyonda kod kalitesi kritik önemdedir: ✔ SOLID prensiplerine uygun geliştirme, ✔ Clean Architecture ve Domain-Driven Design yaklaşımı, ✔ DRY, KISS prensiplerine bağlılık, ✔ Linting, formatting ve code review disiplinine uyum, ✔ Yüksek test coverage hedefi, ✔ Güvenli kod yazımı (OWASP best practices), ✔ Performans ve bellek optimizasyonu bilinci, ✔ Scalable & maintainable system design yaklaşımı. 🎯 Adayda Aradığımız Nitelikler Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerden mezun, En az 4 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme deneyimine sahip, Node.js ve NestJS ile backend geliştirme konusunda güçlü deneyim sahibi, React ve Next.js ile modern frontend uygulamaları geliştirmiş, PostgreSQL ve MongoDB veri tabanlarında yetkin, Mikroservis mimarisi, servisler arası iletişim ve ölçeklenebilir sistem tasarımı konularında bilgi sahibi, Authentication, authorization ve güvenlik katmanlarında tecrübeli, Git flow, code review ve temiz kod geliştirme prensiplerine hakim, Unit ve integration test süreçlerini aktif olarak uygulayan, Docker ile containerization ve deployment süreçlerinde deneyimli, Teknik analiz, sistem tasarımı ve mimari karar süreçlerinde sorumluluk alabilecek. Artı Değerler ⭐ Kubernetes deneyimi, ⭐ Event-driven architecture bilgisi, ⭐ High-traffic sistemlerde çalışma deneyimi, ⭐ CI/CD pipeline kurulumu (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI vb.), ⭐ Message broker sistemleri deneyimi, ⭐ Agile/Scrum süreçlerine katılım.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: MindMons is an AI venture studio building ambitious products at the intersection of data, AI, and real-world systems. We're looking for full-stack developers who are comfortable on both ends of the stack, take pride in their work, and want to build things that are actually used. What You'll Do Build and maintain reliable, well-structured backend services Develop frontend interfaces that are fast and easy to reason about Design data models that hold up under real production conditions Integrate AI and language model capabilities into product features Work with AI agent frameworks or orchestration patterns Take ownership of features end-to-end, from scoping to deployment What We're Looking For 2+ years of professional full-stack or backend-heavy development experience Strong command of server-side development and API design Solid frontend experience with modern component-based frameworks Clear understanding of relational and non-relational database design Hands-on experience integrating AI/LLM services into production systems Clean, readable code and the ability to move independently on complex problems

title: Senior Backend Developer - Node.js
description: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Backend Developer - Node.js in Turkey. This is an exciting opportunity to join a globally distributed engineering team building high-performance, real-time financial technology systems. In this role, you will design and develop backend services that power complex, scalable platforms used by a global user base. You will work on cutting-edge features, APIs, and integrations while ensuring top-tier performance, reliability, and security. Operating in a fast-paced and innovation-driven environment, you will collaborate with talented engineers to tackle challenging technical problems. The position offers strong ownership, allowing you to contribute from architecture to deployment. If you are passionate about distributed systems, backend performance, and building resilient platforms, this role offers both impact and growth. Accountabilities Responsibilities You will play a key role in building and maintaining robust backend systems, ensuring scalability, security, and performance across all services. Your responsibilities include: Designing, developing, and maintaining backend services using Node.js and modern JavaScript frameworks. Building and optimizing APIs and microservices to support high-throughput, low-latency applications. Contributing to the development and launch of new features and products using agile methodologies. Ensuring platform scalability and reliability to support growing global usage and real-time transactions. Implementing strong security practices across backend systems to protect data and infrastructure. Collaborating with cross-functional teams to integrate backend services with other systems and applications. Working with databases such as MySQL and MongoDB to manage and optimize data storage and retrieval. Monitoring system performance, troubleshooting issues, and continuously improving backend architecture. Requirements The ideal candidate is a highly skilled backend engineer with strong problem-solving abilities and experience working on complex, scalable systems. Key qualifications include: Strong proficiency in Node.js and JavaScript, with experience building production-grade applications. Solid understanding of microservices architecture and distributed systems. Experience developing and maintaining complex platforms with high availability requirements. Hands-on experience with databases such as MySQL and MongoDB. Familiarity with security best practices in backend development. Ability to quickly learn new technologies and adapt in a fast-paced environment. Strong analytical and debugging skills, with attention to performance and scalability. Experience with message queues, caching systems, or job queues (e.g., Redis) is a plus. Knowledge of additional languages such as Ruby, Rust, or C++ is advantageous. Exposure to blockchain technologies or high-availability systems is a strong plus. Benefits Fully remote work environment with flexibility and autonomy. Opportunity to work on cutting-edge technology in a fast-evolving industry. Competitive compensation package aligned with experience and impact. Continuous learning opportunities, mentorship, and professional development support. Collaborative and innovation-driven culture with global team exposure. Career growth opportunities in a rapidly evolving technical landscape. Regular team-building activities and knowledge-sharing initiatives. How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Mid Backend Engineer
description: A Bit About Us... Please allow us to celebrate our own success for a moment... We've built a customer-centric product that is market-leading, and we are smashing it! We're a multi-award-winning digital payments and insight platform within the automotive industry. We work with over 5,000 automotive retailers, helping drivers to pay for motoring costs, accessories, and other services through a variety of different payment options. Our purpose is to build a solution that gives drivers peace of mind while enhancing customer experience and assisting with dealer profitability. Bumper is a fast-growing payments scale-up and we’re excited to continue building on our growth having completed a successful Series B funding round in 2024. We’re looking to hire a dynamic and passionate Mid Backend Engineer, based in Ankara. Our Head Office is in Sheffield City Centre, with offices also based in London and Turkey. We've also expanded further, bringing retailers in Ireland, Germany, Spain, and the Netherlands on board, with the vision of being the leading automotive payment and insights platform! Our Engineering Team is based in Ankara, Turkey , and we are looking for a Mid-Level Backend Engineer to join our amazing crew! What will you do as our Mid Backend Engineer? As a Mid Backend Engineer, you will report directly to the Team Lead and play a key role in designing, developing, and maintaining our backend systems to ensure the functionality and scalability of our platform. Your Responsibilities Will Include Sharing best practices and mentoring less experienced engineers Identifying and implementing process improvements within the team Collaborating closely with experienced engineers to continuously learn and grow Bringing innovative ideas to enhance system-wide performance and scalability Diagnosing and resolving system issues across the platform Taking ownership of tasks from inception to completion with minimal supervision Debugging and maintaining applications while ensuring code efficiency and performance Using Git for version control and tracking code changes What are we looking for? Skills We want to work with someone who is curious, collaborative, and committed to delivering high-quality solutions. Here are the skills and attributes we value: 3+ years of hands-on experience with Python and Django Strong knowledge of SQL databases and experience optimising database performance Understanding of software design principles and experience building REST APIs Proficiency in Git and version control best practices Strong verbal and written communication skills in English Excellent time management and ability to meet deadlines Ability to collaborate effectively with the Product Team and other stakeholders A proactive mindset to identify and address technical and customer concerns The Bumper Way : We embrace these core values— Ambitious, Adaptable, Dedicated, Trustworthy, Inclusive, and Positive . If this sounds like you, we want to meet you! What do we offer? At Bumper, we believe in recognising and rewarding our team members. Here are some of the benefits you’ll enjoy: Competitive net monthly salary (paid in GBP £) Hybrid working model (3 days in the office, 2 days remote) 26 days of annual leave (after your first year) Private health insurance £250 annual welfare allowance to support your well-being £200 monthly lunch pass Flexible work-life balance with our Bumper Flex policy Bumper Retreats—company-wide annual trips (passport required!) Join Bumper and become an ambassador for our innovative product and a key player in our mission to become Europe's #1 payment platform . Ready to join us? If you meet the criteria and are excited about Bumper's vision, we would love to hear from you! Apply now and become part of our exciting scale-up journey. Let's build the future of automotive payments together! Perks are nice, but we know perks don’t make up the whole package of a great job. By joining our Bumper team, you'll have the opportunity to be an ambassador for our product & brand, and help us to continue on our winning streak! We can’t wait to meet you! ✨
